domain: MDBootstrap eCommerce → BB Order Management Patterns
purpose: Order admin patterns for Phase 3+ internal tooling

patterns.name: Order Table
patterns.description: Data table with order ID, customer, product, status, date columns.
patterns.tailwind_structure: overflow-x-auto → table w-full → thead with amber headers → tbody rows

patterns.name: Product Management Cards
patterns.description: Product grid with edit/price controls for admin.
patterns.bb_data_source: Hardcoded initially → ENV vars → later database
patterns.status: Phase 3 — prices managed via Vercel env vars for now

patterns.name: Order Status Badge
patterns.description: Color-coded status pills: New / Confirmed / Picked Up / Shipped.
patterns.status: Phase 3 — use in admin order table
